---
title: "04 Production Architecture"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Main Question

How do we structure computer vision systems for long-term maintainability?

## Runnable Example

```bash
uv run python localize.py --config configs/localization.yaml --no-mlflow
```

The runner delegates to package code:

```text
localize.py
  -> load_localization_config
  -> run_localization_workflow
  -> estimator, failures, evaluation, observability
```

## Engineering Focus

- `Strategy`: failure scenarios change observation behavior without changing estimator code
- `Factory`: config loaders create dataclasses from YAML
- `Observer`: MLflow and report artifacts observe runs without owning core logic
- `Builder`: workflow assembly creates truth, observations, estimates, metrics, and artifacts

## Exercise

Add a new YAML scenario and run it without editing `localize.py`.
